programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When you eat chicken frequently, it pays to have a number of preparations on hand. In this episode, we turn to orange-flavored chicken and chicken teriyaki.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: One of our favorite Spanish dishes is paella. But with a lengthy ingredient list the shopping alone can give the home cook pause. We take a hard look at paella to see if we can pare back this dish to its humble origins without losing its alluring flavors.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to develop a hassle-free pizza recipe especially for the grill—one we hope will become a new backyard barbecue favorite.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork loin is delicious roasted in the oven, but it takes on a new character when cooked on the grill. The fire imparts a delicate smokiness to the meat, and the heat creates a handsome crust. French potato salad is a perfect counterpoint to the pork.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop a recipe for pulled pork that rivals that of the best barbecue joints but won't be an all-day affair. We pair the pork with another barbecue classic—cornbread.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: If you're a fan of saucy barbecued chicken, you'll love pulled chicken. Similar to the more traditional pulled pork, it's simply tender shreds of smoky grilled chicken moistened with barbecue sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Summer desserts are all about fruit. As inviting as a bowl of sweet berries can be, there's something about baked fruit desserts that we can't resist. In this episode we take a look at two summer favorites: blueberry cobbler and free-form fruit tart.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: With its impressive mounds of tender, juicy apples and melt-in-your-mouth pastry crust, deep-dish apple pie should take your breath away. Creating a pie with such a high volume of filling does, however, pose challenges.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There seems to be a cookie to fit any occasion or mood. In this episode we look at two from opposite ends of the style spectrum—the thick, homey oatmeal and the dainty, elegant spritz.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we aim to resurrect the traditional birthday cake. We've developed an honest-to-goodness layer cake with an old-fashioned jam filling and real butter frosting—the type of cake guaranteed to put a smile on anyone's face.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: German chocolate cake—filled with sticky pecans and coconut—is not without flaws. We set out to develop a German chocolate cake that avoids the common pitfalls and delivers on its promise.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to make a meatloaf with well-seasoned meat and just enough binder to give the loaf a tender, not tough, texture. In choosing a side dish to partner with our meatloaf, we turned to another old-fashioned dish—skillet-roasted potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Dinners prepared entirely in one skillet are perfect for weeknight cooking. Less cleanup is one obvious benefit. A skillet also gives the cook a bit more control over cooking multiple elements.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Beef, beer, and onions have a natural affinity—it's one reason burgers and onion rings are often on bar menus. In a carbonnade, the beef melds with the soft sweetness of sliced onions in a lightly thickened broth that is rich, deep, and satisfying.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted a streamlined version of roast chicken with plenty of stuffing to go around. First, we needed to solve the problem of cooking the stuffing to a safe temperature without drying out the delicate breast meat of the chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Boneless pork chops are lean and quick-cooking, making them ideal for weeknight meals. Pork tenderloin, which is also lean, has a somewhat fussy reputation, but you don't need to be a professional chef to cook tenderloin properly.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We make a fresh-tasting, quick tamale pie with a juicy, spicy mixture of meat and vegetables and a quick homemade-cornbread topping. We also show you how to cook up a really flavorful chicken stew topped with a biscuit crust.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Whether we admit it or not, there are some dishes that are a little too high in fat and calories to be enjoyed on a regular basis. Even a modest portion of macaroni and cheese or chicken Parmesan is prohibitive. But that doesn't need to be the case.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to be able to serve English-style fish and chips—large pieces of moist and delicate cod in a crisp and tender coating with thick-cut fries—at home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Commonly found at catered events, this once-highbrow dish has become a bit of a joke. But after preparing several cookbook versions, we realized that pairing a crisp-fried coating with a delicate butter sauce was a great idea that deserved a revival.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: While the hallmark of this filet mignon is its tender texture, some argue that the beefy flavor is too mild, lacking the oomph of fattier cuts like rib eye. So we aim to boost the filet mignon's flavor with a peppercorn crust and a rich pan sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We love a good stir-fry served with rice, but a noodle cake, a savory round of tender noodles sautéed in a skillet until the exterior is crisp, is also a great base for a saucy stir-fry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We prepare a Thai-inspired beef stir-fry and share a recipe for great potstickers.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We create tasty versions of two Tex-Mex favorites: chicken fajitas and huevos rancheros.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Just when we think we've become familiar with every Italian dish under the sun, we're pleasantly surprised to come across one we've somehow overlooked—Spaghetti with Marinara Sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Fifty years ago, steak Diane was prepared tableside and included a burst of pyrotechnics supplied by a match and some cognac. Sure, such theatrics might seem a bit dated and silly, but they are essential to the flavor of the dish. We explain why.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most of us might not have time to prepare eggs during the week, but come the weekend, eggs are a terrific way to begin a leisurely day. In this episode, we take a look at a couple of our favorite egg dishes—scrambled eggs and omelets.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody learns a lesson in love when he and Mitch help a troubled violinist escape her dangerously overbearing mentor with a secret agenda. Meanwhile, Alex sets out to prove her worth at Baywatch by retaking the grueling rookie test with Jessie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Alex tries to save a diamond smuggler whose partners want him to "sleep with the fishes." Neely makes Hobie a tempting offer that divides the Buchannon household.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kala Brown made national headlines when she was discovered alive 2 months after disappearng in South Carolina. She was kidnapped, locked in a metal storage container & chained on the neck by a serial killer. Kala speaks about her life in captivity.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo busca respuestas cuando el cuerpo de un respetado técnico de la Marina, en las reservas es encontrado flotando en un lago donde se lleva a cabo un evento comunitario popular.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando Karen y Jimmy son tomados como rehenes en un restaurante después de que el robo de una joyería sale mal, intentan mantener a los otros clientes a salvo de los ladrones.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La ciudad que nunca duerme
programme.desc: Cuando el famoso actor Russell Berke, quien siguió a Danny para investigar su próximo papel, es apuñalado, Danny lo ayuda, pero debe mantener el crimen en secreto debido al estatus de celebridad de Russell.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Proteger y servir
programme.desc: Danny negocia con un hombre que mantiene a Erin como rehén en la corte. Mientras, Frank decide el castigo para Jamie, quien desobedeció órdenes y fue suspendido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La verdad sobre mentir
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan la muerte de una adolescente empujada al metro. Frank se molesta por la supervisión del nuevo Inspector General en el NYPD.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Desaparecida
programme.desc: Danny y Baez sospechan que una niña podría ser víctima de secuestro, pero su madre lo niega, aunque su historia no cuadra. Mientras, Frank visita a un sacerdote, consejero del NYPD, arrestado por conducir ebrio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Hotch recibe una llamada telefónica de su hermano Sean, de quien está separado y reside en Nueva York, de quien no ha escuchado nada durante cuatro años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras el caso de Éxtasis en Nueva York, el imitador pirateó el sistema informático de García, en el que publica fotografías de cada uno de los miembros del equipo en Nueva York y su tarjeta de visita “Zugzwang”.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el suicidio de un oficial de la Marina retirado, que dejó una moneda rara y valiosa en el Museo Nacional de la Marina. El equipo se imagina a sí mismo en la historia de su vida para reconstruir cómo la moneda quedó en su poder.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga la muerte de un oficial de la Marina asesinado de la misma manera que sus padres hace una década, se topan con un contenedor de almacenamiento lleno de casas de muñecas que muestran recreaciones de escenas de asesinatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo busca respuestas cuando el cuerpo de un respetado técnico de la Marina, en las reservas es encontrado flotando en un lago donde se lleva a cabo un evento comunitario popular.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/09/14. Bourdain takes a trip to the haunts of his youth that marked the start of his culinary career, and he candidly discusses his descent into heroin addiction and recovery. He then heads to the western part of the state.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 11/16/14. Anthony Bourdain travels to Jamaica, where he visits the home of James Bond author Ian Fleming and learns about music legend Bob Marley.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/11/2015. The alluring island of Okinawa is explored by Bourdain from historical, political, cultural and culinary perspectives.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/18/2015. Anthony Bourdain ventures to the Bay Area, where he tries Brazilian Jiu Jitsu, discovers healing through nourishment and enjoys soul food at Real Miss Ollie’s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/28/14. Anthony Bourdain explores Shanghai by savoring home-style cuisine and having meaningful conversations with locals about the culture and the booming economy.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two young men are found murdered after scamming Sam Braun's casinos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A casino employee is beaten and raped on her way home from work, but she survives and identifies her attacker.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A feverish night in Las Vegas results in one dead male in an alien suit, one more dead male in a bathtub, one dead female with two suspicous men at the scene, and another dead male with a polaroid of yet another dead male.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Heavy rains in Vegas wash up a body in the storm drains. As the team investigates, they find bones in the sewer system that could only be murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted from outside a convenience store, triggering an Amber alert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a hotel suite with symptoms of the ebola virus.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a woman after a swap party where the married couples in the neighborhood meet and switch partners.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is called to a murder of a 17-year-old in a casino penthouse. The entire team gets involved when its discovered that a kidnapping took place along with the murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The killer from The Execution of Catherine Willows returns with deadly results.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman who was pulled over by the police is found murdered two miles up the road from the stop. It's not long before Robbins determines that the woman is, genetically speaking, not a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is confronted with new evidence while on the stand of a murder trial of a restaurant owner.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the starving death of a five-year-old boy. They discover the boy has siblings who are in danger too.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, for his final proficiency, has to determine how the Sherlock Holmes of a Sherlock Holmes club was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick looks into the murder of a man by someone who apparently needs a wheelchair. Nick looks into the murder of a woman in the subculture of the narcocorrido, songs about drug murders.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El destino de Sara sigue siendo una incógnita mientras el equipo de CSI se apresura a averiguar si ha sobrevivido al ataque del asesino en miniatura, en el estreno de la octava temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos inusuales. La muerte de un conductor de go-carts cuyo cuerpo decapitado se encuentra a metros de la carretera por la que corría, y el misterioso asesinato en un restaurante donde los clientes cenan en la oscuridad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de toda una familia, excepto el de una hija que supuestamente está poseída por el diablo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren a un joven estrangulado hasta morir ahorcado ...cuyo cuerpo parece el de una mujer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra entre bastidores en un estudio de cine porno de terror para investigar el asesinato de una actriz de cine slasher asesinada en el plató de una de sus películas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En la primera parte de un episodio crossover de dos partes que concluirá en Without A Trace, una víctima de secuestro de Nueva York que desapareció hace seis años puede ser el mismo chico cuya muerte Grissom y el equipo de CSI están investigando.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the case of a man boiled alive, Julia spirals out of control, and one of the team's darkest secrets comes to light.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio fights to save Yelina and when Delko goes against Calleigh's plea and helps his dangerous father, his life is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: As Delko's life hangs in the balance, Horatio flashes back 12 years to reveal how Miami's CSIs first met and became a team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the lab is attacked, Horatio must fulfill a gunman's unique request in order to save five hostages, including new CSI Jesse Cardoza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Three volleyball players mysteriously drop dead on the court, while Calleigh's testimony against Delko threatens his future as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the most hated man in Miami is murdered, Horatio Caine and the CSI team go on the hunt for his killer and his hidden treasure.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alexx Woods and Eric Delko return to help Horatio Caine and the CSI team stop a deadly viral outbreak in beautiful Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team recreate a night of bachelor party debauchery in order to solve a murder and find a missing groom.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine calls Las Vegas CSI Dr. Ray Langston to come to Miami when a severed leg found in the Everglades is discovered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio and the CSI team investigate who or what caused a horrific car accident, both drivers' darkest secrets are revealed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In beautiful Miami, deadly jellyfish are being used as murder a weapon, and a mysterious woman from Jesse's past returns.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The investigation of a dead census worker sends the team into a high speed car chase and an explosion that threatens the lives of two CSIs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Eric Delko returns to Miami as an expert witness for the defense pitting himself against his old friends Horatio and the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When America’s sweetheart, Phoebe Nichols, bursts into flames during a concert, the CSIs expose the dark side of pop stardom.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga las vidas de quienes viven en un aeroparque de lujo después de que una avioneta se estrella en un lugar popular de Miami Beach.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran muerto a un guardia de seguridad después de que suenan disparos en el concierto de la estrella del rap 10-Large y llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la evidencia de una investigación de asesinato lleva al equipo de CSI a creer que el asesino puede estar en Nueva York, Horatio lleva su investigación a la Gran Manzana.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran estrangulada a una actriz de cine para adultos en el parque y llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar y encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una peligrosa investigación lleva al equipo de CSI por un camino traicionero que conducirá a la trágica pérdida de uno de los suyos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La vida de Yelina está en peligro cuando Horatio y el equipo de CSI trabajan en un caso para condenar a un rapero sospechoso de un tiroteo al estilo de Miami desde un auto en movimiento.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un flash mob surge en un campo de golf privado, ¿el grupo de estudiantes estaba allí para esconder un cuerpo o para dejar uno?

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Empujan a una mujer frente a un tren en movimiento del metro de Miami y tanto su novio como la exnovia acosadora son sospechosos de su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El ambiente de discoteca de Miami se vuelve mortal cuando el consumo de alcohol por parte de menores provoca un sangriento asesinato en un baño, Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un viaje de campo del jurado a la escena de un asesinato provoca un vuelco legal cuando el acusado termina muerto y los doce miembros del jurado se convierten en los principales sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una noche de citas rápidas para los solteros de Miami se vuelve mortal para un machote de South Beach que está en el extremo equivocado del carro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami Beach es evacuada debido a un tsunami, pero el equipo de CSI permanece después de descubrir un complot de robo a un banco mientras investiga un asesinato aparentemente aleatorio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una serie de cadáveres, encontrados frente a la costa de Miami, resulta ser obra de piratas modernos. Horatio y el equipo investigan.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial killer’s verdict overturned when Mac jails his arresting officer, but a victim surfaces sporting the killer’s signature.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella is forced to deal with painful memories when Det. Valens visits and says her DNA is connected to a Philadelphia cold case making her a suspect.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are puzzled when evidence and witnesses point to John McEnroe as their murder suspect despite his air-tight alibi.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Hawkes are forced to save the lab when a drug lord and his crew descend upon the CSI’s vault to retrieve their merchandise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder on the Statue of Liberty rattles New York City as the CSI team tries to catch the killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a professional diver in relation to a rumor of sunken treasure in the New York Harbor.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a murder tied into a string of “spy” robberies targeting the elite while Mac continues to receive mysterious phone calls.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York based team investigates the bizarre murder of a scientist, as well as the unusual death of a college girl.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a string of murders in New York that revolve around an online world, apparently performed by a hit man.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate two eerie murders on Halloween; one, an apparent zombie attack, the other a faked murder/suicide in a house with a spooky past.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team works to solve two seemingly unrelated murders that after investigations are underway turn out to be connected.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates crimes: one involving a model that was killed on a billboard in Times Square, and another centered around a robbery.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a groom on his wedding day and the appearance of a mysterious box on the hood of Stella’s car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac travels to Chicago in order to solve the mystery of the 333 caller while the rest of the CSI team works on a murder in a subway car.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Presa (S5 Ep20)
programme.desc: Mientras investiga la muerte a tiros de un hombre en un teatro vacío, Stella se da cuenta de que la escena del crimen es extrañamente familiar y planeada.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Pasado, presente y homicidio (S5 Ep21)
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre muere al caer del piso 52 y su cuerpo desaparece después de tocar el suelo, el equipo de CSI debe tratar este caso como la desaparición de una persona.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Aniversario luctuoso (S5 Ep22)
programme.desc: La subasta de joyas más exclusiva del año termina abruptamente cuando asesinan a un tasador durante el evento. Hay un cambio emocional en la investigación.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Un bien mayor (S5 Ep23)
programme.desc: Mac le informa a un ex convicto que cumplió condena por un crimen que no cometió y Anna le dice a Danny que es hora de que nazca el primer bebé del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La verdad me engaña (S5 Ep24)
programme.desc: Stella descubre que los neoyorquinos están siendo asesinados por artefactos griegos antiguos, ella entrega su placa para seguir una pista que la lleva a Grecia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Págale (S5 Ep25)
programme.desc: Al trasladar al hijo de Robert Dunbrook de la cárcel al tribunal, un grupo de secuestradores profesionales embosca a la policía de Nueva York.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: For a lawyer, Oliver should be more careful about what he signs. Lisa reminds him that two years ago Oliver made her a promise to take her back to New York for a two-week vacation. And she has it in writing… on the bottom of the kitchen drawer.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: There's a problem in Hooterville: no farmer seems able to grow a cash crop on account of the quality of the soil. But as it turns out from Oliver's (Eddie Albert) soil and mineral research, the oft-misunderstood rutabaga is an ideal choice.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Hooterville is abuzz as the townsfolk enter a contest sponsored by Peterson's Poi Juice, with a trip to Hawaii as the top prize. But no one expects the winner to be Arnold, the Ziffels' talented pig. Maybe a pig might fly after all, to the islands!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: A charity rummage sale asks for donated clothing. Being among the wealthier residents of Hooterville, the organizers look to the Douglases. It isn't long before Oliver has to stop Lisa from giving away his entire wardrobe!

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: During an operation to send out twenty Allied soldiers, two of them attempt an early escape and are nearly captured.

programme.desc: Bubba gets involved when his cousin Candace and her husband Kevin are being blackmailed by Waylon Davis, the birth father of their adopted baby. Davis threatens to contest the adoption unless they cooperate, but will they give in to his demands?

programme.desc: En el 2007, Brian y Beverly Mauck fueron encontrados muertos en su casa en Graham Washington. Usando una huella de la palma de una mano y de un zapato en la escena del crimen, los investigadores enfocan su atención en Daniel Tavares, quien había tatuado la espalda de Brian.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a un popular profesor de gimnasia muerto por lo que parece ser una herida de bala accidental, su familia se pone sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de inspeccionar el daño de una tormenta en un hogar en Tampa, un asesor de seguros simplemente desapareció. Treinta horas después, su cuerpo apareció en un río cercano. Pero el asesino había sido descuidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una estudiante universitaria desaparece, sus compañeros de clase estaban preocupados por la seguridad de ella y la de ellos.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: 25 anys després de la seva estrena, 'Forensic Files' segueix sent la sèrie de crims reals més exitosa de tots els temps.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un barco camaronero de dos hombres se hundió cuando una violenta tormenta de rápido movimiento azotó la costa de Luisiana. El capitán se ahogó y el marinero fue rescatado catorce horas después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan desafortunado puede ser un hombre? Su esposa se quitó la vida y su novia de la universidad se suicidó de la misma manera catorce años antes. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto era solo una extraña coincidencia o dos asesinatos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los excursionistas cerca de Anchorage, Alaska, descubrieron un cuerpo envuelto en sábanas con bordes de costura naranja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray fue acusada de la muerte de su esposo. Su hijo estaba tan convencido de su inocencia que se matriculó en la facultad de derecho, estudió todas las pruebas y, finalmente, descubrió la verdad de lo que realmente sucedió entre sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En un tranquilo pueblo de Gran Bretaña, un granjero se encuentra con una apariencia escalofriante. Empalado en el poste de la cerca hay una cabeza de cordero cortada y una nota que dice: Usted es el próximo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, Kathy Lorick fue asesinada en una pista de carreras en Concord, California, en pleno día, mientras hablaba con su esposo por su teléfono móvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El pensamiento rápido de un investigador lo ayuda a capturar una huella de zapato hecha en la nieve antes de que la evidencia se desvanezca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Aceitoso en la mañana
programme.desc: Cuando la policía recuperó el automóvil sumergido de un hombre al que se denunció su desaparición, esperaban encontrar su cuerpo, pero no estaba allí.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer fue identificado como el hombre que violó y estranguló a cinco jóvenes mujeres en Virginia. Con el uso de perfiles de ADN, se libera a un hombre inocente y se condena al verdadero asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 20 de Mayo del 2001, Carrie Nelson fue golpeado hasta su muerte mientras trabajaba en unas oficinas comerciales. El caso quedó sin resolver durante seis años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un millonario y su familia fueron ejecutados en su propio hogar. Durante tres años, los crímenes quedaron sin resolverse. Finalmente, una caja de 30 años de municiones y unas fibras fluorescentes revelan la traición final.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una bomba, construida para poder causar tanto daño como sea posible, mata a la víctima con una fuerza y llama mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2007, el trailer de Effie y Michael Ratley en Florida se incendia y Michael heroicamente rescata a su esposa e hijo. Un mes después, su esposa es encontrada golpeada hasta la muerte en una habitación de la casa de sus padres.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mia’s T-Bombz campaign is hitting the city and Degrassi. But Holly J has bigger and better things going on. She’s prepping the Power Squad for an out-of-town competition, and things are looking good.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate to win Jane back, Spinner sneaks into the Leadership Convention Jane is speaking at and proposes. When Jane turns him down, Spinner breaks up with her – nothing he does is ever good enough.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s the star of Degrassi’s first-ever football game win! The Shep is floored at how much Riley’s improved.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare stands up for Connor when he receives unfair treatment from The Shep. The result of their peaceful protest? Detentions for everyone. No one is more frustrated by the detention than Alli. It wasn’t her idea to protest.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Shep has returned after his sensitivity training and it’s Spirit Week at Degrassi! However spirits are anything but high at home for Jane as she struggles to get her dropout brother Lucas off the couch.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane admits to herself that her issues with her dad go deeper than the divorce – she thinks maybe he did things to her. Jane is very confused and feels alone. Lucas gives Jane a hard time for creating tension between mom and dad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s tired of being referred to as Kelly’s girlfriend and Blonde Emma – she’s not even blonde anymore! Determined to create a distinct university identity, Emma borrows some pot that was gifted to Kelly and smokes up with Becca and Gwyneth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli wants Johnny to like her, a lot. She worries she’s going to lose him to an older more “experienced” girl so to make sure she keeps her man close, Alli decides to play with the big kids at a ravine party.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Stress is at an all-time high at Degrassi with exams approaching and course selections due for next term.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Spinner have been through so much together. They’re best friends. Jane’s just come out of a difficult year at home, so hanging out with Spinner is safe and… easy. That’s not a bad thing, right?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli insists she’s done with Johnny. When she breaks into his locker to steal nude photos of herself back, she, in fact, realizes that she’s so not over him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jane and Holly J team up for a practicum business assignment and immediately bond over their idea to start a babysitting agency.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: It is only in recent years that experts have unearthed the biggest dinosaurs that ever lived. One monster eclipsed all others, more than seven times as heavy as diplodocus was the immense argentinosaurus.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A new generation of carnivores was about to take killing to the next level. At the end of the Cretaceous period, these new hunter killers had spread throughout the globe.

programme.title: Planet Dinosaur
programme.desc: A look at bizarre dinosaurs such as the curious buck-toothed Exipdexipteryx, the amazing four-winged Microraptor and the pot-bellied Nothronychus.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: When an old mysterious book enters his life, everything changes for young Chris Parsons.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Salateen tells Peri and the Doctor they are dying from spectrox tomaemia.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Jek believes Peri will fall in love with him and the Doctor is caught by the gunrunners.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: A citadel contains Zeraphin power.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor tries to outwit the Master.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Caught in a warp ellipse, the TARDIS is drawn to a huge spacecraft.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: At Brendon School, the Doctor enlists the help of the Brigadier.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Mawdryn and his eternal mutants are awake and reveal the truth.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Doctor Who

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps owners of rescue dogs including a terrier mix that screams and a Belgian Tervuren scared of her own home; Cesar helps a family adopting their first dog.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's English adventure ends with an aggressive klee kai, a collie mix that hates walks, and a hyper Labrador.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar brings discipline to four chaotic Chinese crested dogs, an over-energetic mastiff mix and two unruly miniature dachshunds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chichuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive bulldog; a beagle/terrier mix with a fear of trash cans; a Lab mix who starts to exhibit anxiety outside.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: New series focusing on the tumultuous home and professional life of bounty hunter Dwayne "Dog" Chapman, and his partner and wife Beth. In the first episode, Dog and team chase Floyd Chapman (no relation), a heavily tattooed bail jumper.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In Hawaii, Dog sets off from Honolulu to Kona to help his son Leland with some of his fugitives. First, a stop at Leland's boxing gym to warm up for their day of hunting with a quick sparring session and some father-and-son time together.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to bribe Kirby to prevent her from marrying Adam; Claudia receives another package from her late husband; Fallon remains unable to walk, until her child's life is in danger.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle learns she is pregnant; Fallon suffers from painful headaches; Claudia and Steven visit Matthew's accident site in Peru; once home, however, Claudia receives a phone call from her late husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis makes a plan to upset Blake's business deal with Rashid Ahmed; Tracy attempts to seduce Blake and is fired; Steven grows suspicious of Dex, who places a mysterious phone call to Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex finds Alexis with Rashid and turns to Tracy for comfort; learning the reasons behind her father's death, Kirby buys a gun; the mysterious caller turns out to be a tape-recorded message; Alexis moves ahead with her plan to ruin Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby learns the truth behind her father's suicide; Krystle tells a stunned Alexis of her pregnancy; Fallon and Jeff announce they will remarry. Blake is planning to attack a nation involved in the China Seas Deal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake travels to Hong Kong to patch up the China Seas oil deal and learns Ahmed has left the country; Mark blackmails Alexis for $100,000, and McVane watches as he deposits the check; Kirby attempts to kill Alexis but is unsuccessful.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis thwarts Blake's loan extension; Sammy Jo arrives in Denver to see her son; after quarreling with Alexis, Mark is found dead after a fall from her balcony.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake mortgages the mansion to raise money; Tracy tells Alexis of her affair with Dex; Alexis is questioned about Mark's death; Sammy Jo intends to obtain custody of her son; an unknown woman, full of curiosity about Alexis, checks into La Mirage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby's attempt to kill Alexis is unsuccessful, and Alexis promises to remain silent if Kirby will leave Adam; Sammy Jo reveals the culprit behind Claudia's mystery calls; Fallon is gripped with a seizure and drives off as her wedding is about to begin.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following a serious traffic accident, Fallon mysteriously vanishes. Dex and Steven bail Alexis out of jail. Sammy Jo attempts to seduce Adam. Alexis flatters Adam by suggesting he work with her defense attorney, Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven accuses Adam of conspiring with Sammy Jo to kidnap Danny. Blake arranges to take out a mortgage on the mansion. He little suspects Alexis has signed the note and will become the owner if he defaults.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: To secure financing for his bankrupt company, Blake arranges to see Billy Waite, a notoriously underhanded oil man. Jeff continues his search for Fallon. Impatient with the progress her lawyer is making on her defense, Alexis fires Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: In Seattle, Jeff and Blake learn the woman who died in the plane crash with Peter DeVilbis cannot be positively identified, but the ring she was wearing is indeed Fallon's wedding band. Back in Denver, Fallon's moving funeral is held.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake visits Dominique at La Mirage to discuss her recent revelation. She tells Blake that her mother was a long-time mistress of his father and has evidence to prove it. At Alexis' trial, a neighbor offers powerful evidence that incriminates Alexis.

programme.title: Wild Iran
programme.desc: Benny Rebel approaches a big cat in the semi desert with caution. An Asiatic cheetah is like an icon of Iranian nature. The carnivore accepts Benny in its closer environment. The photographer takes breath taking shots.

programme.title: Wild Medicine - Animals' Superpowers
programme.desc: Animals are true superheroes. They have superpowers that we humans can only dream of. Some grow back their limbs after they have lost them. Others let huge bones grow on their heads at a rapid speed.

programme.title: Wild Memoirs of a Film Crew
programme.desc: In this episode, the film crew and presenters reflect on heart-stopping wild encounters.

programme.title: Wild Memoirs of a Film Crew
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew witness unbelievable athleticism as a lioness tackles an impala in midair. The crew share rhino incidents that were probably a bit too close for comfort. Startling encounters pursue with elephants that will never be forgotten.

programme.title: Madagascar - Land Of The Chameleons
programme.desc: Traveling through Madagascar, we search for some of the most fascinating lizards on earth: the chameleon. With 59 of its 150 species known today living on Madagascar, and only there, this island can claim to be the home of the chameleon.

programme.title: Great White Shark: Beyond The Cage Of Fear
programme.desc: Most people believe that the Great White Shark is a mindless eating machine. But what if we are wrong? In Beyond the Cage of Fear, a crew of scientists forms a relationship with a 2,000 pound Great White Shark named Bruce.

programme.title: Forests of Our Earth
programme.desc: A forest is like an organism, ancient and full of complex mechanics at work. Its plants need water and a specific range of temperature. And still, it can be found in the most variable places of the world.

programme.title: Anaconda - Silent Killer
programme.desc: Few snakes are feared more and understood less than the anaconda. The film shows the journey into remote and uncharted parts of the Amazon rainforest to find the truth behind the mythical beast.

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest - The Giants Of Rurutu
programme.desc: Humpback whales have come back from the brink of extinction, but they are still difficult to approach in the water and their behaviour and vocalisations pose many unsolved questions.

programme.title: Adventure Ocean Quest, Special 1 X 90
programme.desc: The atoll of Fakarava in Polynesia is a true underwater paradise with an extraordinary diversity of wildlife.

programme.title: Great White Shark: Beyond The Cage Of Fear
programme.desc: Most people believe that the Great White Shark is a mindless eating machine. But what if we are wrong? In Beyond the Cage of Fear, a crew of scientists forms a relationship with a 2,000 pound Great White Shark named Bruce.

programme.title: The Animal Communicator
programme.desc: What if you could talk to animals and have them talk back to you? Anna Breytenbach has dedicated her life to communication. She sends messages to animals through pictures and thoughts, and receives messages back!

programme.title: Realm Of The Robber Crab - Christmas Island
programme.desc: Thievery and treachery are second nature for the world's largest land crab. Realm of the Robber Crab explores the untold story of Christmas Island's iconic robber crabs.

programme.title: Ambitions

programme.title: The Herd with Colin Cowherd
programme.desc: THE HERD WITH COLIN COWHERD is a three-hour sports television show hosted by Colin Cowherd and Jason McIntyre. Cowherd is a veteran broadcaster with over 20 years of experience in the sports television and radio field.

programme.title: First Things First
programme.desc: FIRST THINGS FIRST is a daily sports talk show hosted by Nick Wright, Chris Broussard and Kevin Wildes. Wright started his broadcasting career as a critically acclaimed radio host and is joined by longtime sports reporter and commentator Chris Broussard.

programme.title: Breakfast Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by Craig Carton, Mark Schlereth, and Danny Parkins, Breakfast Ball is a fun and lively morning show discussing the biggest sports stories of the day.

programme.desc: Elyse is excited at the prospect of reviving her folk-singing career at a local nightclub.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is so sure that he will be named valedictorian of his class that he can't cope with the thought of being defeated by a girl-especially his girl.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: In the hospital awaiting a tonsillectomy, Jennifer fears she may never see her family again.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse feels the need to expand her horizons.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: The news that their mother is pregnant sends the three Keaton kids into an angry outburst resulting in a family battle.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Timecop
programme.desc: Max Walker, an officer for a security agency that regulates time travel, must fend for his life against a shady politician who's intent on changing the past to control the future.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: A woman reporter discovers a Defense Department project to create androids from the bodies of Vietnam soldiers, to be then used as an elite anti-terrorism unit.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: The Return

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle was fatally injured in what police believed to be a hit-and-run accident. Tiny clues found at the scene created a picture of the vehicle which struck him and led police to its driver.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search when the mother of two young children went missing. Twenty years after her body was found, new technology recontextualized old evidence and pointed directly to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The day has arrived for the three to get their master stripes. Lily and Theo pass the test to become masters. Casey does not. He wanders off to think about his loss and comes across Jarrod saving Camille from Dai Shi's monsters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Nobody believes him, but Casey knows that Jarrod still lives inside of Dai Shi. He goes off on his own to save Jarrod. In an epic battle between Dai Shi and Casey, Jarrod manages to break free of Dai Shi.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: As the Venjix Virus comes closer to taking over Dillon entirely, the other Rangers and Dr. K race to find a way to slow the growth rate of the virus.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.

programme.title: My Goldfish Is Evil

programme.title: My Goldfish Is Evil
programme.desc: An ill-conceived attempt to turn himself invisible renders Admiral Bubbles green and glowing. Beanie takes him to a veterinarian to see if he can be cured, and the vet announces that he needs to be kept overnight for observation.

programme.title: My Goldfish Is Evil
programme.desc: Inspired by the horrible mess that Beanie has cooked up for his mother's breakfast, Admiral Bubbles decides to cook up a garbage monster, bringing it to life to do his evil bidding and to terrorize the town.
